name: Fried Liver with Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut liver into serving pieces and pat dry with paper towels.
2. In a pie plate, combine flour, salt, pepper, and paprika.
3. Dip liver in the mixture to coat both sides well.
4. Heat margarine and vegetable oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
5. Saute garlic until golden brown.
6. Add liver and cook quickly, about 2 minutes per side. Remove to a warm platter and keep warm while preparing the sauce.
7. In the same skillet, melt margarine and saute onion until cooked through.
8. For the sauce, mix together water, cornstarch, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard in a bowl.
9. Blend the sauce mixture into the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
10. Add pickle and cook an additional minute.
11. Return liver to the sauce and heat through.
12. Serve immediately.
